_comment: Branch & chapter directory for the /branches page. type: branch | local | partner. lat/lng place the map pin. contact rows: [emoji, text, optional link]. To add a location: copy a block.

branches.name: Sakyadhita Mongolia
branches.desc: Active in translation and Buddhist education across Central Asia.

branches.name: Sakyadhita Malaysia (KBS)
branches.desc: Hosted the 19th International Conference in Sarawak, 2025.

branches.name: India · Bodh Gaya
branches.desc: Where Sakyadhita was founded in 1987. Coordinated by the Mahabodhi community.

branches.name: Sri Lanka
branches.desc: Active in bhikkhuni ordination support and educational outreach.

branches.name: Taiwan
branches.desc: Coordinated through Foguang Shan and Dharma Drum Mountain alumni networks.

branches.name: Sakyadhita USA
branches.desc: Headquartered in San Diego, California. Administrative hub for the organization.

branches.name: Sakyadhita Brazil
branches.desc: Active community based in São Paulo with regional outreach.

branches.name: Canada
branches.desc: Local chapter with members in Toronto, Vancouver, and Montréal.

branches.name: Sakyadhita France
branches.desc: Strasbourg-based national branch. Active in European outreach and translation.

branches.name: Sakyadhita Germany
branches.desc: German-speaking community. Coordinates with Hamburg University vinaya scholars.

branches.name: Network of Buddhist Women in Europe
branches.desc: Pan-European federation of Buddhist women's organizations.

branches.name: Egypt · Cairo
branches.desc: Small but committed chapter. Newest addition to the directory (2024).

branches.name: Sakyadhita Australia
branches.desc: Hosted the 16th International Conference in the Blue Mountains, 2019.
